hero_badge: Fintech Infrastructure · GST Compliant · RBI Safe Practices
hero_description: BillMeX gives every Indian merchant from solo professionals to multi outlet businesses bank grade invoicing, escrowed payments, and biometric checkout in minutes.
feat_title: Everything a merchant needs. Nothing they don't.
feat_sub: Built on a production-grade Spring Boot backend with real wallet, ledger, and settlement infrastructure.
feat_gst_d: Generate professional invoices with automatic CGST / SGST / IGST calculation based on your GST registration and buyer's state.
feat_escrow_d: Every payment is held in a protected escrow wallet before settlement — ensuring trust between merchant and customer.
feat_facepay_d: Customers enrol their face once and pay anywhere — no phone needed at checkout. India-first biometric payment experience.
feat_pos_d: Barcode scanning, product lookup, and one-touch invoicing designed for physical retail environments.
feat_analytics_d: Real-time charts and metrics built from your actual transaction data — not estimates or projections.
feat_ledger_d: Every debit and credit is recorded in a tamper-proof ledger. Full audit trail for regulatory compliance.
feat_gst_tools_d: Understand GST rates, calculate tax instantly, and stay compliant with built-in GST resources for Indian businesses.
why_title: Built for Indian merchants. Not adapted from a Western template.
why_reg_d: GST, UPI, and IFSC compliance built in from day one. No plugin required.
why_inst_d: FacePay and UPI enable sub-3-second payment confirmation at the counter.
why_escrow_d: Payment disputes? Funds sit in escrow until both parties confirm. No chargebacks.
why_bank_d: JWT authentication, password hashing, and secure token refresh on every request.
how_sub: From registration to your first paid invoice in under 10 minutes.
how_s1_d: Register with your business name, owner info, and email. No bank details at signup.
how_s2_d: Add your UPI ID, bank account, and optional GST number from the dashboard.
how_s3_d: Create your product catalogue with prices and GST rates. Barcode support included.
how_s4_d: Send invoices, accept UPI or FacePay, and monitor settlements in real time.
cta_sub: Join merchants already using BillMeX for GST invoicing, escrow payments, and biometric checkout.

gst_hero_sub: Learn GST basics, calculate taxes instantly, and simplify compliance.
gst_subtitle: Everything you need to know about GST compliance, rates, and filing deadlines.
gst_card_info_1_d: Goods and Services Tax (GST) is a comprehensive indirect tax levied on the supply of goods and services in India. It has replaced multiple cascading taxes levied by the central and state governments.
gst_card_info_2_d: Businesses with turnover exceeding ₹40 lakhs (₹20 lakhs for special category states) must register for GST. Registration can be done online through the GST portal.
gst_card_info_3_d: Regular taxpayers must file monthly/quarterly returns including GSTR-1 (outward supplies), GSTR-3B (summary return), and annual return GSTR-9.
gst_ph_query: Any specific questions about GST registration or compliance?

reg_success_d_c: Your account is ready. You can now use FacePay at participating merchants.

face_instr_init: Point your face at the camera and click Capture

footer_copy: © 2026 BillMeX · Next Generation Billing & Payment System · Built for India
company_hero_badge: Fintech · Made in India · Built for Scale
company_hero_desc: A next-generation billing and digital payment infrastructure platform designed for modern Indian businesses.
company_mission_text: BillMeX is a next-generation billing and digital payment infrastructure platform designed for modern businesses. Our mission is to simplify invoice management, enable secure biometric payments, and bring transparency to financial transactions. We believe every Indian merchant — from solo entrepreneurs to large enterprises — deserves bank-grade financial tools without the complexity.
company_evolution_desc: Moving beyond traditional billing to a unified, biometric-first financial ecosystem.
comp_ev_s1_d: Bank-grade security with JWT authentication and encrypted biometric data storage.
comp_ev_s2_d: Proprietary facial recognition technology allowing seamless, device-free checkout experiences.
comp_ev_s3_d: Full tax compliance logic built into every invoice, handling CGST, SGST, and IGST effortlessly.
comp_ev_s4_d: Reliable fund holding mechanisms to ensure trust and transparency in every transaction.
company_phil_title: Built for the Modern Indian Merchant
company_phil_desc: BillMeX was founded on the belief that sophisticated financial infrastructure shouldn't be limited to global giants. We've engineered a platform that combines powerful billing, secure biometric payments, and real-time ledger tracking into a single, intuitive experience. Designed from the ground up to be localized and compliant, BillMeX empowers businesses to focus on growth while we handle the complexity of modern finance.
company_team_desc: A dedicated team of developers redefining the fintech landscape.
team_m1_d: Backend architect specializing in secure transaction processing and API infrastructure.
team_m2_d: UI/UX specialist focused on crafting seamless merchant and customer dashboard experiences.
team_m3_d: Escrow system expert ensuring fund security and transparent settlement workflows.
team_m4_d: Analytics lead developing real-time financial reporting and GST compliance modules.
team_m5_d: Biometric integration specialist building the future of device-free FacePay checkout.
comp_val_s1_d: Sub-second invoice generation and payment processing — designed for high-volume retail.
comp_val_s2_d: JWT auth, encrypted biometric templates, and immutable ledger entries protect every transaction.
comp_val_s3_d: Tools that level the playing field — enterprise-grade infrastructure accessible to every business.
comp_val_s4_d: GST, UPI, and IFSC compliance baked into the platform from the ground up.
cta_desc_join: Join thousands of merchants using BillMeX for modern billing and payments.
prod_hero_desc: Modular, enterprise‑grade building blocks for your entire billing and payment lifecycle.
prod_suite_desc: Everything you need to bill, collect, and grow — built for Indian merchants and compliance.
cta_prod_sync: See how BillMeX products work together to power your business.
sol_hero_badge: BillMeX Solutions · Built for your business model
sol_hero_desc: From retail and healthcare to SaaS and B2B enterprises — BillMeX adapts exactly to how you sell and collect.
sol_sect_desc: Tailored billing and payment solutions for every industry and business model.
sol_c1_d: Complete POS, invoicing, and payment collection for physical retail stores with barcode scanning and FacePay checkout.
sol_c2_d: Professional invoicing, GST compliance, and escrow-protected payments for business-to-business transactions.
sol_c3_d: Recurring billing, plan management, and automated dunning for subscription-based businesses.
sol_c4_d: Patient billing, appointment fee collection, and secure biometric identity verification for healthcare providers.
sol_c5_d: Fee collection, tuition installment plans, and automated receipts for schools, colleges, and coaching institutes.
sol_c6_d: Multi-party payment splitting, seller onboarding, and commission management for marketplace platforms.
sol_cta_d: Talk to our team about which BillMeX solution fits your business model.
ind_hero_desc: BillMeX adapts to the unique billing and payment needs of your sector — from retail to healthcare and education.
ind_sect_desc: Sector-specific billing configurations, compliance, and payment flows built for Indian businesses.
ind_c1_d: Unified omnichannel billing for physical stores and online commerce with real-time inventory sync.
ind_c2_d: HIPAA-aligned patient billing with secure biometric identification and insurance-friendly invoice formats.
ind_c3_d: Express check-in and seamless billing for hotels, resorts, and travel agencies with FacePay guest IDs.
ind_c4_d: Fee collection, installment plans, and automated receipts for schools, colleges, and online learning platforms.
ind_c5_d: Seat-based or usage-based billing for software companies, API services, and AI tools.
ind_c6_d: In-vehicle payment solutions for fuel, parking, EV charging, and shared mobility services.
ind_c7_d: Secure client KYC, premium billing, and claims processing for banks, insurance, and wealth management.
ind_c8_d: Wholesale invoicing, bulk order management, and escrow-protected B2B payment processing.
ind_cta_d: Schedule a demo to see how BillMeX can be customized for your specific sector.
